title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
